/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../Lib/Package/libExchanger.a  CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/CameraExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/CaptureExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/ChainExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/CommExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/Exchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/ExchangeKind.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/GUIExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/GeneralExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/ManagerExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/MediaExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/NetIPAbilitySet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/NetIPDeviceInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/NetIPOperation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/NetPlatform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/NetWorkExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Exchanger.dir/Source/StorageExchange.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../Lib/Package/libExchanger.a
